response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced senior/staff engineer with ~18 years across web, embedded, and backend systems, which makes him significantly overqualified for an entry-level junior position. His hands-on Java exposure is limited (mostly TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang), and his German is listed as basic while the role requires strong verbal and written German for client-facing insurance consulting work. Retention and salary-expectation risks for a junior role are high, and the core language requirements are not met.
strengths: Strong OOP and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, agile, pairing)
Broad full-stack and cloud experience (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Berlin-based with a computer science degree, meeting formal education requirements
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level junior position — retention and compensation mismatch
Only basic German, while the role requires strong German communication with clients
Limited recent Java experience; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang

key_factors.factor: Solid OOP fundamentals and agile experience
